description:
Debug Network Faster & Smarter with Proxyman

Proxyman is a high-performance Windows app, which enables developers to capture, inspect, and manipulate HTTP/HTTPS requests/responses with ease.
⚡️ Improve
- Better Scripting Editor: Hover to show the syntax, better auto completion
- Bring Back old logic: Toggle Play/Stop Recording button doesn't affect the System Proxy Overridden

🐞 Bugs
- Map Local Binary file and Proxymnalogv2 Timing
- Transfer-Encoding: chunked is added on 304 Not Modified
